message:
feat: add e2e tests for ntm doctor command

End-to-end test suite for the ntm doctor (system diagnostics) command.

Test structures:
- DoctorReport: Overall health report with timestamp and status
- ToolCheck: Tool availability and version checks
- DepCheck: Dependency installation and version validation
- DaemonCheck: Background process health monitoring
- ConfigCheck: Configuration validation results
- InvariantCheck: System invariant verification

Build tag: //go:build e2e ensures these tests only run with
explicit e2e tag (go test -tags=e2e).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
